description: Org brand identity as a service: tokens, voice, display elements, artifact templates with counterparty slots, and named assets. All operations are reads; providers hold the org's single source of brand truth.

operations.name: get-brand-guidelines
operations.description: Return the brand guidelines relevant to a composition context. Consumers call this BEFORE composing an artifact.

artifact_type.description: Artifact type slug (e.g., 'status-report', 'proposal'). Null returns org-wide guidelines without artifact-type tone modifiers.

format.description: Output format the artifact will be produced in.

sections.description: Which guideline sections to return: any of 'voice', 'visual', 'structure'. Default: all.

guidelines.description: Structured guidelines: tokens (palette/typography/spacing for the format), voice (org voice + applicable tone modifiers), structure (artifact-type structural rules when artifact_type given).

brand_usage.description: 'required' or 'optional' — the org-wide enforcement switch from provider config.

brand_book_version.description: Provider collection version, for artifact provenance stamps.

operations.name: get-element
operations.description: Return one display element's semantic definition and its rendering for a format.

element_name.description: Element slug (e.g., 'table', 'cover-page', or a custom element).

found.description: Whether the element is defined in the published brand book.

element.description: Semantic definition + the requested format rendering. Null if not found.

rendering_missing.description: True when the element exists but has no rendering for this format — consumer falls back to its native default.

operations.name: get-template
operations.description: Return a named artifact template: composition (sections, element placements) and declared slots.

template.description: Sections, element placements, formatting rules for the format.

slots.description: Declared placeholder slots: {name, kind: 'image'|'text', placement, sizing, clear_space, required}. Slot VALUES are always supplied by the consumer at compose time.

operations.name: get-asset
operations.description: Return a named brand asset (logo, icon, pattern) by its registered name — never by path.

asset.description: Asset metadata: {name, kind, format, remote_path or id anchor, dimensions, usage_rules}.
